/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so.1.12.1 -o ../../../lib/libgtest_main.so.1.12.1 CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/ACORN/build_local/lib ../../../lib/libgtest.so.1.12.1
